Run KERNELSU_BRANCH="KernelSU"
  KERNELSU_BRANCH="KernelSU"
  
  case "$KERNELSU_BRANCH" in
    KernelSU|*)
      BRANCH="main"
      ARTIFACT="manager"
      ;;
    KernelSU-Next)
      BRANCH="old"
      ARTIFACT="manager"
      ;;
    Sukisu-Ultra)
      BRANCH="main"
      ARTIFACT=manager"
      ;;
    ReSukisu)
      BRANCH="main"
      ARTIFACT="manager"
      ;;
  esac
  
  echo "manager_branch=$BRANCH" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
  echo "manager_artifact=$ARTIFACT" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
  shell: /usr/bin/bash -e {0}
  env:
    CCACHE_COMPILERCHECK: none
    CCACHE_NOHASHDIR: true
    CCACHE_NOHARDLINK: true
    CCACHE_IS_KERNEL_COMPILING: true
    CCACHE_MAXSIZE: 5G
    FILE_CONF: oneplus_11
    FILE_BASE: OnePlus11
    MANIFEST_REPO: OnePlusOSS
    MANIFEST_REPO_NAME: kernel_manifest
    MANIFEST_BRANCH: oneplus/sm8550
    CPU: sm8550
    ANDROID_VERSION: 16.0.0
    ANDROID_SHORT_VERSION: 16
    CPUD: kalama
    BUILD_METHOD: gki
    CCACHE_DIR: /home/runner/.ccache_oneplus_11_b
    CACHE_KEY: 38dab1c55ecc6d656989e7b6dec2f586
    KERNEL_REPOS: msm-kernel
    KANDROID_VERSION: android13
    KERNEL_VERSION: 5.15
    TKERNEL_VERSION: 5.15.180
    KV1: 5
    KV2: 515
    KV3: 515180
    KERNEL_SHORT_VERSION: 5.15
    KERNEL_SHORT_PATCH_VERSION: 5_15
    ENABLE_RUST: false
/home/runner/work/_temp/e775ec7e-0782-4f2f-a534-8db99a993b9f.sh: line 23: unexpected EOF while looking for matching `"'
Error: Process completed with exit code 2.
